title: Search everything on Mobile App

posts.author: SharonM (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love it if when someone searched on the mobile app there was an option to “search everything” like there is on desktop. When I try to search for a specific item, it doesn’t come up as anything, you have to know what board it is on and items move from board to board so this can be tricky to track.
